expectations.text: Identifies instanceSelector mismatch as the cause, not generic 'check your YAML'
expectations.evidence: 'Root cause: instanceSelector mismatch ... not a check your YAML syntax problem'

expectations.text: Cites the specific label dashboards: grafana as the homelab standard
expectations.evidence: 'Confirm the homelab standard label dashboards: grafana'

expectations.text: Provides kubectl get grafana -n monitoring --show-labels
expectations.evidence: 'kubectl get grafana -n monitoring --show-labels'

expectations.text: Explains the operator silently skips non-matching CRDs with no status error
expectations.evidence: 'silently skips ... emits no error to the resource status'

expectations.text: Avoids suggesting Grafana UI edits or pod restart as the primary fix
expectations.evidence: 'Do not fix this by editing the dashboard in the Grafana UI or restarting the pod'

expectations.text: Identifies instanceSelector mismatch as the cause, not generic 'check your YAML'

expectations.text: Cites the specific label dashboards: grafana as the homelab standard
expectations.evidence: 'The convention in this homelab is the label dashboards: grafana'

expectations.text: Provides kubectl get grafana -n monitoring --show-labels
expectations.evidence: 'kubectl get grafana -n monitoring --show-labels'

expectations.text: Explains the operator silently skips non-matching CRDs with no status error
expectations.evidence: 'the resource status stays empty ... a silent skip, not a failure'

expectations.text: Avoids suggesting Grafana UI edits or pod restart as the primary fix
expectations.evidence: 'Do not fix this by editing the dashboard in the Grafana UI or restarting the pod'

expectations.text: Uses label_values() for Prometheus var, explicitly rejects it for Loki
expectations.evidence: 'label_values(up, container) ... Do not use label_values() for the Loki variable — Prometheus-only'

expectations.text: Loki variable query as object form {"label":"container","stream":"{}"}
expectations.evidence: '"query": { "label": "container", "stream": "{}" }'

expectations.evidence: 'uid: ${DS_PROMETHEUS} ... uid: ${DS_LOKI}'

expectations.text: Uses label_values() for Prometheus var, explicitly rejects it for Loki
expectations.evidence: 'label_values(up, container) ... that syntax is Prometheus-only'

expectations.text: Loki variable query as object form {"label":"container","stream":"{}"}
expectations.evidence: '"query": { "label": "container", "stream": "{}", "type": 1 }'

expectations.text: Uses ${DS_PROMETHEUS} and ${DS_LOKI} uid references (portable)
expectations.evidence: 'uid: ${DS_PROMETHEUS} ... uid: ${DS_LOKI}'

expectations.text: Sets refresh: 2 so variables re-query on time range change
expectations.evidence: '"refresh": 2 — refresh on time range change'

expectations.text: Notes every panel must include {container="$container"}
expectations.evidence: 'If you leave {container="$container"} off a panel ... a confusing mismatch'

expectations.text: Requires GrafanaFolder CRD before GrafanaAlertRuleGroup
expectations.evidence: 'Create the folder (required prerequisite) ... cannot be applied unless its folder already exists'

expectations.text: Two-refId structure: A raw PromQL, C with datasourceUid __expr__ threshold
expectations.evidence: 'refId A ... refId: C datasourceUid: __expr__ type: threshold'

expectations.text: datasourceUid must match explicit uid in GrafanaDatasource spec
expectations.evidence: 'set an explicit uid ... datasourceUid: prometheus must match'

expectations.text: Store Discord webhook in a Secret via secureSettings, not plain YAML
expectations.evidence: 'never commit it in plain YAML. Store it in a Kubernetes Secret ... secureSettings'

expectations.text: Default notification policy contact point must be set or alerts go nowhere
expectations.evidence: 'Fired alerts go nowhere until the default policy points at a real contact point'

expectations.text: Requires GrafanaFolder CRD before GrafanaAlertRuleGroup
expectations.evidence: 'create the folder FIRST ... Apply the folder before the rule group'

expectations.text: Two-refId structure: A raw PromQL, C with datasourceUid __expr__ threshold
expectations.evidence: 'refId A is the raw PromQL query ... refId C is a threshold expression (datasourceUid: __expr__)'

expectations.text: datasourceUid must match explicit uid in GrafanaDatasource spec
expectations.evidence: 'must equal the uid you set explicitly ... If you let Grafana auto-assign'

expectations.text: Store Discord webhook in a Secret via secureSettings, not plain YAML
expectations.evidence: 'Never commit it in plain YAML — put it in a Kubernetes Secret ... secureSettings / valuesFrom'

expectations.text: Default notification policy contact point must be set or alerts go nowhere
expectations.evidence: 'An alert can fire perfectly and go nowhere if the notification policy default receiver isn't set'

notes: NON-DISCRIMINATING on all 3 evals: baseline scored 15/15, matching with_skill on every discriminating detail (instanceSelector silent-skip + dashboards: grafana label + --show-labels; Prometheus label_values vs Loki object-form + ${DS_*} + refresh:2; folder-first ordering + A/C __expr__ refIds + explicit datasourceUid + Secret/secureSettings + default notification policy). The homelab-specific conventions were reproduced by the baseline.
